Oracc: SAAo/SAA01 — The Correspondence of Sargon II, Part I: Letters from Assyria and the West

SAA 01 067. The Bathroom of the Hilanu Palace (ABL 0487)[via saao/saa01]

Obverse
o 1o 1

[a-na LUGAL] ⸢EN⸣-[ia]

(1) [To the king, my] lord: [your servant] Ṭab-šar-[Aššur]. [Good health] to the king, [my lord]!

o 22

[ARAD-ka m]⸢DÙG⸣—IM—[aš-šur]

o 33

[lu-u DI-mu] a-na LUGAL [EN-ia]

o 44

[ina UGU] ⸢KÁ⸣ ša É—ra-⸢ma⸣-[ki]

(4) [As to the g]ate of the bathroom [of] the big hilānu palace of which the king, [my lord], wrote to me, I have just got hold of the [... and am herewith sending them] to the king, my lord.

o 55

[ša] É—ḫi-la-ni dan-nu ša ⸢LUGAL*⸣ [be-lí]

o 66

⸢iš⸣-pur-an-ni an-nu-rig ⸢tim?⸣-[me x x]

o 77

⸢ú⸣-ṣa-bit ina UGU LUGAL EN-ia [ú-se-bi-la]

o 88

⸢na*⸣-ga-lu*-bu pa-ni-u ša ⸢x⸣+[x x x x]

(8) The old-fashioned razor which stood [...], even if [......], will be removed [from] the gate.

o 99

[o*] ⸢i⸣-za-zu-ni ù šúm-mu [x x x x]

o 1010

⸢KÁ*⸣ i-na-šu*-ru ina UGU ⸢x⸣+[x x x x]

(10) As to [the ... of] the tower, with reed [......

o 1111

[x] ⸢i*⸣-si-ti ina* ŠÀ* GI.AMBAR ⸢x⸣+[x x x x]

o 1212

[x x x x]-⸢tu*⸣ ša ⸢i*⸣-[x x x x]

rest broken away

(Rest destroyed)

Reverse
rr destroyed

Adapted from Simo Parpola, The Correspondence of Sargon II, Part I: Letters from Assyria and the West (State Archives of Assyria, 1), 1987. Lemmatised by Mikko Luukko, 2009-11, as part of the AHRC-funded research project “Mechanisms of Communication in an Ancient Empire: The Correspondence between the King of Assyria and his Magnates in the 8th Century BC” (AH/F016581/1; University College London) directed by Karen Radner. The annotated edition is released under the Creative Commons Attribution Share-Alike license 3.0. Please cite this page as http://oracc.org/saao/P334334/.
